metadata.title: Indonesia Golf Courses Directory
notes: Coordinates are best-estimates from address geocoding; verify before production map use.
Some courses (Bintan Lagoon Sea View/Woodlands) closed since 2020 - flagged in notes.
Several outer-island entries lack lat/lng; use Google geocoding API to fill in.
Listed courses verified through official sites, IAGTO, GolfPass, GolfAsian, Golfsavers, golflux, top100golfcourses, indonesiagolfcourses.com (APLGI).

financials.operating_company: PT Pondok Indah Padang Golf Tbk
financials.parent_group: Pondok Indah Group (sister entity to PT Metropolitan Kentjana Tbk/MKPI; distinct legal entity)
financials.membership_price_notes: Verified Pondok Indah Golf does NOT publish membership rates publicly. The original site (golfpondokindah.com) only lists Green Fees; Membership is contact-only (+62-21-7694906). Historical Republika 2014 article cited Rp 70M original card price escalating ~Rp 1.5B in resale market — 10+ year stale, not reliable for 2026. Previous '2.5B' figure was unverified estimate.
financials.recent_news: PT Pondok Indah Padang Golf Tbk is one of 6 OJK-mandated 'public companies' (Tbk status) that has NOT yet completed IDX listing/trading per POJK 3/2021 (mandate deadline 2023 passed). Files annual reports with OJK but shares not exchange-traded. Correct OJK code is PIPG (NOT 'PIGS' previously cited).
financials.ownership_notes: Operator is PT Pondok Indah Padang Golf Tbk — separate from PT Metropolitan Kentjana Tbk (MKPI). MKPI operates Pondok Indah Mall, Office Tower, and Golf Apartment (residential) but does NOT operate the golf course itself. Both entities are sister companies within the broader Pondok Indah Group. PIPG is OJK-registered Tbk but not exchange-traded.
